title: Baylis & Harding Sweet Mandarin & Grapefruit Gift Wrapped Candlelit Bathing Gift Set - Vegan Friendly

features: LUXURIOUS GIFT SET: Treat yourself or a loved one to this pampering gift set with sweet mandarin and grapefruit essentials
FEATURES: Includes 300 ml bath bubbles, 300 ml body wash, 50 ml hand & nail cream and 60 g scented candle perfect for a relaxing evening
VEGAN FRIENDLY: Indulge guilt-free with this vegan-friendly and cruelty-free gift set wrapped in beautiful packaging
FRAGRANT DELIGHT: Immerse yourself in the uplifting scent of sweet mandarin and zesty grapefruit for an invigorating experience
PAMPERING ESSENTIALS: Enjoy the spa-like experience at home with this indulgent combination of skincare treats for your body and senses
description: Product Description Beautifully wrapped and ready to pop under the tree, treat her to a luxury candlelit pamper with our 300ml crème bath bubbles, 300ml body wash, 50ml hand & nail cream and 60g scented candle. Art deco design meets timeless luxury with our enduring Sweet Mandarin & Grapefruit collection. Our most iconic fragrance, composed with beautiful jasmine and layered with sparkling citrus top notes brings a luxe dimension to this classic assortment. An elegant monochrome palette coupled with a geometric print masterfully accented with gold foil accents, perfectly finesses this seasonal collection. Timeless, always understated and elegant; Sweet Mandarin & Grapefruit is our most iconic and best-selling fragrance. Enduring in its appeal, its subtle fragrance, a blend of jasmine and orange with sparkling top notes of sweet mandarin, grapefruit and lemon. Ingredients BATH BUBBLES: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycol Distearate, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Limonene, Linalool, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Ci 19140 (Yellow 5), Ci 16035 (Red 40).BODY WASH: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Limonene, Linalool, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Ci 19140 (Yellow 5), Ci 14700 (Red 4).HAND & NAIL CREAM: Aqua (Water, Eau), Cetearyl Alcohol, Paraffinum Liquidum (Mineral Oil), Stearic Acid, Glyceryl Stearate, Glycerin, Peg-100 Stearate, Phenoxyethanol, Caprylyl Glycol, Carbomer, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Hydroxide, Benzophenone-4, Citral, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Citrus Limon Peel Oil Oil, Eugenol, Limonene, Linalool, Linalyl Acetate, Pinene, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes. Directions CRÈME BATH BUBBLES - POUR INTO BATH UNDER WARM RUNNING WATER. BODY WASH - LATHER AND RINSE. HAND & NAIL CREAM - MASSAGE GENTLY INTO SKIN UNTIL FULLY ABSORBED. Safety Warning WARNING: AVOID CONTACT WITH EYES. IF PRODUCT GETS IN THE EYES RINSE IMMEDIATELY WITH CLEAN WARM WATER. IF SKIN IRRITATION OCCURS DISCONTINUE USE. IF IRRITATION PERSISTS CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR. See more
